contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Partner Poke Scheduler v0 — Stage 1 of AI-first supply chain (code shipped)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/286
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/242
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/243
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/127
  
  Details:
  Shipped the implementation for Stage 1 of the AI-first vertically integrated supply chain vision: the LLM-powered scheduler that turns the DApp bell's Partner Stock + Partner Check-in signals into Gmail drafts under a new AI/Partner Poke label.
  
  ## What shipped (4 PRs across 3 repos)
  
  - tokenomics PR #286 — partner_poke_drafts.gs (~530 lines) co-located with email_agent_drafts.gs. Reads velocity + inventory + Partner Check-ins + Agroverse Partners + Contributors contact information, applies the bell's Partner Stock attention rules, computes dynamic re-poke cadence (days_until_stockout = inventory / daily_rate; gate = max(3, days_until_stockout/2)), calls Grok-3 via xAI for the 2-3 sentence draft body, falls back to a static template if Grok errors, creates Gmail drafts under AI/Partner Poke label. Two draft shapes: real-partner (when contributor has email) and self-poke reminder (when no email — addressed to OPERATOR_EMAIL framed as reminder to poke via the partner's last-successful channel). Logs every attempt to a new Partner Poke Drafts tab on Hit List for cadence enforcement. Awaiting operator clasp-push.
  - tokenomics PR #286 (same) — one-line addition to warmup_review_api.gs adding AI/Partner Poke to WARMUP_ALLOWED_LABELS so the cohort surfaces to the bell + the DApp.
  - dapp PR #242 (merged) — 4th cohort tab on warmup_review.html with hash routing, badge population, Gmail label fallback link.
  - dapp PR #243 (merged) — Bell's Outbound Review count includes AI/Partner Poke in its total + sublabel breakdown.
  - agentic_ai_context PR #125 (merged earlier) — full plan-as-document.
  - agentic_ai_context PR #127 (merged) — plan doc marked v0 code-shipped with the 5-step operator checklist.
  
  ## Human-in-the-loop guarantees (architectural)
  - No GmailApp.send() call anywhere in the GAS file. createDraft only.
  - DRY_RUN script property for trust calibration in the first week.
  - MAX_DRAFTS_PER_RUN cap (default 5).
  - EXPECTED_MAILBOX guard prevents cross-account runs.
  - Dynamic re-poke cadence (operator-driven via Next Check-in Date column) + 3-day absolute floor prevents same-day re-poking.
  
  ## Operator manual setup pending
  1. Clasp-push partner_poke_drafts.gs and updated warmup_review_api.gs.
  2. Add GROK_API_KEY to Script Properties.
  3. Dry-run first via runPartnerPokeDraftsDryRun(), then real run.
  4. Hard-refresh DApp → bell + warmup_review tab pick up the new cohort.
  
  PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/286 (open), https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/242 (merged), https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/243 (merged), https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/127 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
